ignite.name: Ignite
ignite.description: Setup: Burn the target's essence. Generates 15 Concentration and applies [Burned] for 8 ticks.

frost_bolt.name: Frost Bolt
frost_bolt.description: Setup: A bolt of pure ice. Deals minor Magic damage and applies [Chill] (Slow) for 6 ticks.

lightning_bolt.name: Lightning Bolt
lightning_bolt.description: Payoff: A flash of thunderous energy. Deals massive Magic damage. Deals double damage if target is [Chill].

pyroclasm.name: Pyroclasm
pyroclasm.description: Payoff/AOE: An explosion of tectonic heat. Deals AOE Magic damage and applies [Burned] to all.

phase_shift.name: Phase Shift
phase_shift.description: Defense/Reflex: Briefly phase out of reality to avoid a strike. Grants [Untargetable] for 1 tick.

arcane_ward.name: Arcane Ward
arcane_ward.description: Defense: Surround yourself with a shimmer of mana. Reduces the next 3 incoming magic strikes by 40%.

blink.name: Blink
blink.description: Mobility: Instant teleportation to a target room or location.

arcane_surge.name: Arcane Surge
arcane_surge.description: Utility/Signature: Draw raw energy from the ley-lines. Instantly restores all Concentration and boosts Magic damage by 20% for 15 ticks.

mage_physiology.name: Mage Physiology
mage_physiology.description: Passive: Elemental Resonance. Your Magic power is increased by 15% and you gain 10% resistance to elemental damage.
